new_since_v2_1_178.summary: NO SCHEMA CHANGE. v2.1.178 -> v2.1.181 is a pure version bump for the session surface. Across 5 freshly generated v2.1.181 sessions: no new event type, no new/removed/renamed envelope field, no new usage field, no new content block, no new toolUseResult shape. Every CONSUMED field is present and correctly typed. breaking = false; additive = false. The enumerated sets below are carried verbatim from v2.1.178-observed and re-confirmed live at 2.1.181 (except the manual surfaces noted as inferred).

event_types.notes: Identical to v2.1.178. Enumerated live: assistant, user, attachment, ai-title, last-prompt, queue-operation. system / permission-mode / mode not triggered by the headless harness.

envelope_fields.notes: No new fields. `slug` (v2.1.172), `promptSource` (v2.1.172), `agentId`/`attributionAgent` (v2.1.178), `interruptedMessageId` (v2.1.173, on interrupt), `pendingWorkflowCount`/`messageCount` (system) all present and already catalogued — see CONTRACT.md §3.1.

iterations.notes: Still conditionally-populated (empty in single-inference harness turns), unchanged from v2.1.178. [DROPPED].

tool_use_result_shapes.notes: Bash / Edit / Edit(create) / Agent (with resolvedModel) all present and unchanged from v2.1.178.

tool_use_result_shapes_note: Bash, Edit, Edit(create/Write), and Agent observed live at v2.1.181. ToolSearch / TaskCreate / TaskUpdate / other carry forward from v2.1.178 (not triggered by the headless harness) — inferred-unverified at 181.
